pr-evidence/databricks-engine-probe-acti.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the uncommitted diff, ran the focused bundle-template regression, and approved with no findings.
scope: databricks/engine-probe bundle templates, Databricks engine-probe documentation, and bundle contract tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_template_resources.py -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py tests/test_benchmark_plan.py -q; python -m compileall -q src/document_kv_cache src/restaurant_kv_serving; git diff --check; poetry run pytest -q
what_changed: Added actions_output_json to the standalone Databricks engine-probe Asset Bundle template and packaged copy, wired it to --actions-output-json, and updated Databricks docs/tests so declarative probe jobs emit connector-actions sidecars.
pr-evidence/databricks-engine-probe-acti.why: Release evidence now requires document_kv.engine_kv_connector_actions.v1 sidecars for native engine probes; bundle users should not have to switch to the Python helper solely to produce release-ready sidecars.
